verification_statement: Load the dashboard and enumerate the view tabs.
success_criteria: Streams, Stills, and Map tabs are present.

verification_statement: Inspect that switching views tears down prior media; observe only active-view embeds exist in the DOM.
success_criteria: No inactive-view iframes/videos remain mounted.

verification_statement: Open Streams; observe the SLU HLS tile decode video frames.
success_criteria: A live video frame renders (currentTime advances).
evidence: currentTime advanced 0->40 s; campus frame visible.

verification_statement: In a Chromium engine reporting canPlayType='maybe', confirm hls.js (MediaSource blob) is used, not native src.
success_criteria: video.src is a blob: URL; segments load.

verification_statement: Leave a wetmet stream tile visible and time until it stalls to a black frame.
success_criteria: Stream plays continuously for the display duration.
evidence: ANOM-001: stalls to black after minutes; needs manual reload.

verification_statement: Instrument the still-image refresh; measure interval between requests while visible.
success_criteria: Interval <= 30 s.

verification_statement: Inspect still-image request URLs across refresh cycles.
success_criteria: Each request carries a unique cache-busting param.

verification_statement: Analyze wedge vertices for a known az/fov and confirm orientation on the map.
success_criteria: Wedge centerline = azimuth; edges = az +/- fov/2; opens toward the correct cardinal.
evidence: Dummy az34/fov70 opened NE (359-69 deg), confirmed.

verification_statement: Click a map marker.
success_criteria: A modal opens showing that camera's stream.
evidence: Tower Grove test pin opened live MoBot feed.

verification_statement: Review destPoint() spherical destination math against the haversine forward formula.
success_criteria: Formula matches; outputs correct at metro distances.

verification_statement: Inspect the rendered map for OSM attribution.
success_criteria: Attribution control names OpenStreetMap.

verification_statement: Run parse_geo over left/right edge cases including wraparound and left/right-over-az precedence.
success_criteria: Computed azimuth/fov match expected for all cases.

verification_statement: Run the converter over source rows including 'skip' rows.
success_criteria: No 'skip' row appears in cameras.json.

verification_statement: Serve the repo as static files and load it; confirm no server code executes.
success_criteria: Site works from a plain static file server.

verification_statement: Grep the deployed sources for external script/style hosts.
success_criteria: No external CDN <script>/<link> at runtime.

verification_statement: Resize viewport to 320 px; check for horizontal overflow.
success_criteria: No horizontal page scroll at >=320 px.

verification_statement: Enable GitHub Pages from default branch root and load the published URL.
success_criteria: Published site returns 200 and renders.

verification_statement: Push a commit to the default branch and observe redeploy.
success_criteria: Published site reflects the new commit.

verification_statement: Check each camera against the (to-be-defined) St. Louis area boundary.
success_criteria: All cameras fall inside the defined boundary.

verification_statement: View a non-live camera.
success_criteria: A status indicator distinguishes it from live.

verification_statement: Activate each tab in turn.
success_criteria: Exactly one view is active/rendered at a time.
evidence: aria-selected toggles; prior view torn down.

verification_statement: Compare each tab-label count to the dataset.
success_criteria: Label count equals cameras in that view.

verification_statement: View an iframe-classified camera.
success_criteria: The embedded frame renders the feed.

verification_statement: Scroll an HLS card into the viewport.
success_criteria: Playback starts without a manual click.
evidence: Autostart observed for users; flaky only under headless automation.

verification_statement: Activate a link-out card.
success_criteria: The source page opens in a new browsing context.

verification_statement: Open the Map view and count markers.
success_criteria: One marker per geolocated camera.

verification_statement: Hover a map marker.
success_criteria: A tooltip identifies the camera.
evidence: Tooltip shows camera name (+ current az/fov).

verification_statement: Observe base-map tile requests on the Map view.
success_criteria: Tiles load from OpenStreetMap.

verification_statement: Enter the Map view with multiple cameras.
success_criteria: Initial extent includes every geolocated camera.
evidence: fitBounds shows all pins across the metro.

verification_statement: Inspect wedge ground length and visibility at metro zoom.
success_criteria: Wedge ~1600 m and legible at overview zoom.

verification_statement: Inspect runtime data retrieval.
success_criteria: Dataset comes from a single JSON fetch.

verification_statement: Run the converter and diff the output.
success_criteria: cameras.json regenerates from the CSV source.

verification_statement: Inspect geo blocks in cameras.json.
success_criteria: Each has lat/lon; optional az/fov/elev_m/ground_m present where supplied.

verification_statement: Exercise converter name-match and unmatched-marker paths.
success_criteria: Matched rows attach; unmatched render+url become map-only markers.

verification_statement: Inspect the render field of every camera record.
success_criteria: Each is one of {image, hls, iframe, link}.

verification_statement: Trace media request hosts.
success_criteria: Media loads from origin hosts; no proxy origin.

verification_statement: Inspect referrer policy on media elements.
success_criteria: A privacy-preserving referrer policy is set where supported.

verification_statement: Toggle the OS/browser light-dark preference.
success_criteria: Theme adapts accordingly.

verification_statement: Resize the viewport across breakpoints.
success_criteria: Card grid reflows column count.

verification_statement: Review asset path style and host-independence.
success_criteria: All asset paths are relative; copy-deploy is feasible.
